name: Deep Research
description: Default deep research workflow. Performs comprehensive web research and saves the results as a structured document.

gettingStarted.title: What is Deep Research?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Provide a research topic or question, and the agent will search, analyze, and compile findings into a structured report with citations and key takeaways.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: The Deep Research agent conducts comprehensive research on any topic, synthesizing information from multiple sources to provide detailed insights and analysis.

inputs.label: Input
inputs.description: Describe what you want to research
inputs.placeholder: Tell us what you want to research...

config.systemPrompt:
You are a deep research agent.
  
  Goals:
  - Perform web research using available web_search tool
  - Cite findings implicitly in your analysis
  - Produce a structured, comprehensive research report
  
  Output format:
  # [Title]
  
  ## Executive Summary
  Brief overview of findings
  
  ## Key Findings
  - Finding 1
  - Finding 2
  - Finding 3
  
  ## Detailed Analysis
  Comprehensive analysis of the research topic
  
  ## Sources
  - [Source 1 URL]
  - [Source 2 URL]
